name: MirrorMind
description: A journaling AI that reflects your own thinking back at you — not to answer, but to help you think deeper through structured Socratic questioning.

name: IslamicOS
description: A personal productivity system built entirely around Islamic time structure — Fajr to Isha, with task scheduling, focus blocks, and spiritual checkpoints.

name: GhazaliNet
description: An AI-assisted reader for classical Islamic texts that surfaces cross-references between Al-Ghazali, Ibn Arabi, and Rumi in real time.

name: GeoPulse
description: A live geopolitical event tracker that scores news sources on their source ladder position and flags narrative conflicts across hostile outlets.
